title: Play-Gate Verdict
description: Canonical verdict shape emitted by scripts/play-gate.js for one route/child run. Ajv-validated. The required 'ship_decision' field is the D1 regression fence — legacy 'verdict' field is forbidden via additionalProperties:false at the root.

schemaVersion.description: Verdict schema version. Bumped only with a migration plan.

rubricVersion.description: Value of 'version' field in ops/play-gate-rubric.v1.json at runtime.

ship_decision.description: Canonical decision. D1 regression: ajv rejects 'verdict' or any alias.

failure_state.description: Set when the run aborted before criteria could complete. When present, ship_decision MUST be 'do-not-ship'.

child.description: Child identity for the run. 'both' reserved for hub surfaces.

mode.description: fixture = GAS shim; live = seeded sandbox (requires live-smoke infra, PR 3+).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run (e.g. 2026-04-17T12:34:56Z).

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA at which the run was executed.

preconditions.description: PRE-* results. If any fails with failure_action=abort, criteria array is empty and failure_state is set.

criteria.description: Per-criterion results. Empty iff preconditions aborted the run.

screenshots.description: Paths relative to the verdict directory.

notes.description: Optional human-readable context (surrogate approvals, inherited tests, etc.).

id.description: Criterion ID from ops/play-gate-rubric.v1.json (PRE-1..4, U1..16, J1..n, B1..n, C1..6, etc.).

status.description: blocked = rubric marks criterion blocked_on; surrogate = measurement used an LT-approved surrogate.

measurement.description: Raw measurement output. Shape is criterion-specific (e.g. viewport dimensions, match count, duration ms).

evidence.description: Path to criterion-specific evidence relative to verdict directory.

surrogateNote.description: Required when status=surrogate. Must name the LT approval (Issue # + approval date).

reducedMotionInheritsFrom.description: When a route inherits reduced-motion proof from a family-shared component, name the component here (e.g. 'shared/SparkleCelebration.html').
